fields.delivery_address: 3341 Harbor Light Lane, San Pedro, CA 90731
fields.icd_conflict_detail: All three documents (referral form, clinical notes, and prescription) consistently report ICD-10 code G35 (Multiple sclerosis). No conflict detected.
fields.priority_reason: Patient has a confirmed neurological diagnosis of Multiple sclerosis (G35), which is classified as a high-priority neurological condition per intake guidelines, and presents with significant functional limitations including inability to safely navigate the home environment without assistive equipment.
fields.notes: 1) There is a clinical documentation inconsistency: the clinical notes reference 'post-surgical rehabilitation protocol initiated' and a workplace injury date of 01/19/2026, which is atypical for a primary MS diagnosis — this warrants clarification as to whether the commode chair is being prescribed for MS-related functional decline or a concurrent workplace injury. 2) Patient weight is 280 lbs at 5'7'; verify that the standard commode chair (E0163) ordered meets the weight capacity requirement for this patient, as heavy-duty or bariatric variants may be needed. 3) Prescription is valid for 90 days from 02/06/2026, expiring approximately 05/07/2026. 4) Referral was submitted on 02/06/2026 by Case Manager Kevin Osei.
